## createExtensionRegistry() function

Creates an extension registry from a list of extension definitions.

The registry indexes all types, constraints, and annotations by their fully-qualified IDs (`<extensionId>/<name>`<!-- -->) for O(1) lookup during generation and validation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createExtensionRegistry(extensions: readonly ExtensionDefinition[]): ExtensionRegistry;
```

readonly [ExtensionDefinition](./build.extensiondefinition.md)<!-- -->\[\]


</td><td>

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[ExtensionRegistry](./build.extensionregistry.md)

An [ExtensionRegistry](./build.extensionregistry.md) instance.

## Exceptions

If duplicate type/constraint/annotation IDs are detected across extensions.
